title: geum × intermedium willdenowii
intro: Geum × intermedium willdenowii, also known as the Willow-leaved Avens, is a hybrid plant species within the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to Europe and western Asia. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its roots and leaves, which contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, providing anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Geum × intermedium willdenowii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support digestive health, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Geum × intermedium willdenowii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, from digestive issues to skin conditions.
